text:
pgollucci    2010-09-14 03:34:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/duplicity-devel Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/duplicity-devel/files patch-r665-bug613448.diff 
  Log:
  - Bring in commit r665 from upstream which fixes a
    bug (613448) in the ftpbackend which prevents destination
    directories being created.
  
  PR:             ports/149923
  Submitted by:   Jase Thew <freebsd@beardz.net>
  Approved by:    peter.schuller@infidyne.com (maintainer)
